name: PGYTECH OneMo 2 Backpack 35L
description: The black OneMo 2 Backpack from PGYTECH has a 35L capacity and is an all-in-one camera bag designed for professional photographers. This backpack and shoulder bag combo can satisfy diverse needs.

features.Key Features: Backpack with Shoulder Bag | Efficient Organization | Wide Rear Opening | Double Quick Access
features.What’s In The Box: PGYTECH OneMo 2 Backpack (Space Black, 35L) | OneMo Shoulder Bag | 2 x Partition A | 4 x Partition C | 2 x Partition D | 2 x Partition F | 2 x Partition G | Partition H | Partition Fixing Strap | Chest Strap | 2 x Accessory Strap | Waist Strap | Shoulder Strap (for Shoulder Bag)\ | Packing Bag | Tag Card | Promo Card | Logo Sticker
